problem_title: Travel Rule messages disrupt compliance workflows
problem_description: Travel Rule messages often remain isolated within separate provider systems, creating blind spots in compliance operations. This separation leads to delayed exception handling, fragmented case creation, and challenges in maintaining a cohesive audit trail for compliance teams at VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message data, status updates, exception alerts and related provider outputs into one unified case and review workflow for VASP compliance operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule message data through routing, exception handling, case creation, evidence collection and compliance review within one integrated workflow.

workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects Travel Rule provider outputs into structured workflows, cases, decision logs and reports for regulated digital asset businesses such as VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle Travel Rule message workflow?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages, tracks status, manages exceptions and links these events to broader compliance workflows including case creation and evidence preservation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and transparent review of Travel Rule exceptions and compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports integration with multiple Travel Rule providers and other compliance tools to connect data without requiring replacement of existing systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers; it sits above them to organize outputs into audit-ready workflows and compliance decisions.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule outputs into compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY structures Travel Rule messaging, exception handling, case management and audit-ready evidence for your compliance operations.
